feature: Home page should support guest state controls, guest navigation, and login entry from the Person button

userStory: Home page should support guest state controls, guest navigation, and login entry from the Person button

As a guest user, I want the Home page to display the guest-state controls and guest-accessible feature buttons, so that I can use the application before login and open the Login page from the Person/Profile button.
This application is a single page application (SPA).
The workflow begins at: http://localhost/washtabui/home The Home page is the primary landing page for both unauthenticated users and authenticated users.
This workflow covers only the guest-state behavior of the Home page before login.
The Home page in this workflow should be treated as the guest state of the existing Home page, not as a separate page from the authenticated Home state.
GUEST HOME STATE When the application is launched and the user has not signed in, the Home page should load in guest state.

In guest state, the Home page displays the approved guest and shared controls, including: Person/Profile button Back button Notification button Home button Guest-accessible feature buttons Known guest-accessible feature buttons include: Customer signup button Clean survey button Site survey button GUEST-STATE EXPECTATIONS In guest state: The Person/Profile button should be visible and enabled.
Clicking the Person/Profile button should open the Login page or Login view.
Guest-accessible feature buttons should be visible and enabled.
Guest-accessible feature buttons should navigate to their supported destinations.
Authenticated-only controls and authenticated-only feature buttons should not be visible or should not be actionable.

The logged-in user name button should not be visible in guest state.

keywordNames: Verify Guest Home Controls Are Visible And Enabled
Verify Home Page Loaded In Guest State
Verify Home Page Remains In Guest State
Verify Guest Feature Buttons Are Ready
Wait For Element To Be Ready

keywords: Verify Guest Home Controls Are Visible And Enabled
Verify Home Page Loaded In Guest State
Verify Home Page Remains In Guest State
Verify Guest Feature Buttons Are Ready

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state for unauthenticated user
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Home page loads successfully in guest state and displays the approved guest-accessible controls without showing any authenticated user identity state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify guest-state shared Home controls are visible and enabled on initial page load
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, and Home button are visible, enabled, and interactable in guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify guest-accessible feature buttons are visible and enabled in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: Customer signup, Clean survey, and Site survey buttons are visible and enabled for guest users on the Home page.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking the Person/Profile button opens the Login page from guest Home state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application opens the Login page or Login view after the Person/Profile button is clicked from guest Home state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking Customer signup navigates to the customer-search page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application navigates from the guest Home page to the customer-search page after the Customer signup button is clicked.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking Clean survey navigates to the vehicle-survey page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application navigates from the guest Home page to the vehicle-survey page after the Clean survey button is clicked.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify clicking Site survey navigates to the survey page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application navigates from the guest Home page to the survey page after the Site survey button is clicked.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Home button remains visible and enabled in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Home button remains visible and enabled in guest state and clicking it does not break the current Home page state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Notification button is visible and clickable in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible and clickable in guest state and the application remains stable after interaction.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Back button is visible and clickable in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Back button is visible and enabled in guest state and clicking it does not produce an application error or broken SPA state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify guest-accessible feature buttons remain interactable after returning to Home page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: Each guest-accessible feature button continues to function correctly after repeated navigation back to the Home page and each action opens its intended destination page.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify direct navigation to the Home URL always loads guest state for unauthenticated session
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: Direct navigation to the Home URL in an unauthenticated session loads the guest Home state with approved guest controls visible and authenticated-only controls absent.

validations: The Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, and Home button are visible, enabled, and interactable in guest state.
Customer signup, Clean survey, and Site survey buttons are visible and enabled for guest users on the Home page.
The Home button remains visible and enabled in guest state and clicking it does not break the current Home page state.
The Notification button is visible and clickable in guest state and the application remains stable after interaction.
The Back button is visible and enabled in guest state and clicking it does not produce an application error or broken SPA state.
Direct navigation to the Home URL in an unauthenticated session loads the guest Home state with approved guest controls visible and authenticated-only controls absent.
transitions: The Home page loads successfully in guest state and displays the approved guest-accessible controls without showing any authenticated user identity state.
The Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, and Home button are visible, enabled, and interactable in guest state.
Customer signup, Clean survey, and Site survey buttons are visible and enabled for guest users on the Home page.
The application opens the Login page or Login view after the Person/Profile button is clicked from guest Home state.
The application navigates from the guest Home page to the customer-search page after the Customer signup button is clicked.
The application navigates from the guest Home page to the vehicle-survey page after the Clean survey button is clicked.
The application navigates from the guest Home page to the survey page after the Site survey button is clicked.
The Home button remains visible and enabled in guest state and clicking it does not break the current Home page state.
The Notification button is visible and clickable in guest state and the application remains stable after interaction.
The Back button is visible and enabled in guest state and clicking it does not produce an application error or broken SPA state.
Each guest-accessible feature button continues to function correctly after repeated navigation back to the Home page and each action opens its intended destination page.
Direct navigation to the Home URL in an unauthenticated session loads the guest Home state with approved guest controls visible and authenticated-only controls absent.
